ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site (e.g., river, lake, wetland) */,
  "water_body" TEXT /* Name of the water body associated with the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the site in square meters */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the site */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil at the site */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Initial water quality metrics (e.g., pH, dissolved oxygen) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_data" (
  "monitoring_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring event */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site being monitored */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of data collection */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of data collection */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being monitored */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total count of the species */,
  "restoration_year" INTEGER /* Year of restoration (if applicable) */,
  "restoration_age" INTEGER /* Age of restoration (if applicable) */,
  "vegetation" TEXT /* Type of vegetation present (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "X100m" REAL /* Measurement at 100m scale */,
  "X500m" REAL /* Measurement at 500m scale */,
  "X1_2km" REAL /* Measurement at 1.2km scale */,
  "basin" REAL /* Basin measurement */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Water quality metrics at the time of monitoring (e.g., pH, dissolved oxygen) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of monitoring */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation at the time of monitoring */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of monitoring */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of monitoring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monitoring_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_data_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Preferred habitat of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species (e.g., endangered, threatened) */,
  "life_cycle" TEXT /* Life cycle of the species (e.g., annual, perennial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restoration_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the project was implemented */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the restoration project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "project_leader" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  "project_team" TEXT /* IDs of the team members involved */,
  "outcomes" TEXT /* Summary of the project outcomes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restoration_projects_project_leader FOREIGN KEY ("project_leader") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restoration_projects_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, conservationist, policymaker) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions for the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Location of the site (e.g., river, lake, wetland)
